hibernate-mapping.sql-query: SELECT ent.subscription_end_date, ent.entitlement_state, co.source_company_id, eu.entitlement_unit_status, qInfo.license_number FROM psp_quickbooks_info qInfo, psp_company co, psp_entitlement_unit eu, psp_entitlement_code ec, psp_entitlement ent WHERE EC.IS_PRIMARY = 1 AND (qinfo.application_version is null or not regexp_like(application_version, '^\d{2}.\d{2}.[B|A|P].?*$') ) AND qInfo.license_number in :qbLicenseNums AND co.company_seq = qInfo.company_fk AND co.company_seq = eu.company_fk AND ENT.ENTITLEMENT_CODE_FK = ec.entitlement_code_seq AND ent.entitlement_seq = eu.entitlement_fk AND eu.company_fk = co.company_seq

SELECT ent.subscription_end_date, ent.entitlement_state, co.source_company_id, eu.entitlement_unit_status, qInfo.license_number FROM psp_quickbooks_info qInfo, psp_company co, psp_entitlement_unit eu, psp_entitlement_code ec, psp_entitlement ent WHERE EC.IS_PRIMARY = 1 AND (qinfo.application_version is null or not application_version ~ '^\d{2}.\d{2}.[BAP].*$') AND qInfo.license_number in :qbLicenseNums AND co.company_seq = qInfo.company_fk AND co.company_seq = eu.company_fk AND ENT.ENTITLEMENT_CODE_FK = ec.entitlement_code_seq AND ent.entitlement_seq = eu.entitlement_fk AND eu.company_fk = co.company_seq
